## Problem statement

What problem are we solving?

## Proposed solution

Describe the idea and desired behavior.

## Scope

- [ ] contracts
- [ ] service
- [ ] GitHub Actions
- [ ] dashboard
- [ ] docs

## Alternatives considered

List rejected options and why.

## Success criteria

How we know this is done and useful.

## Risks / tradeoffs

Any security, complexity, or maintenance concerns.
